purpose: State file for the daily GarageScape SEO task. Each run reads this, does the day's work, and appends an entry.

runs.notes: First Bow Valley page — biggest coverage gap (Canmore/Banff had zero pages). SERP check showed no dedicated local competitor page (mostly garage-door companies and California Closets). Angle: mountain gear storage (ski/bike/climbing), wildlife-smart attractant storage, chinook/freeze-thaw moisture, small townhome garages. LocalBusiness + FAQPage + Breadcrumb schema (no invented reviews — aggregateRating omitted). Linked TO garage-organization-calgary, garage-storage-solutions-calgary, garage-cleaning-calgary, spring-garage-cleanout-calgary, decluttering city pages. Linked FROM index.html locations grid (new Canmore card). sitemap.xml updated.
next_targets: garage-organization-springbank-hill.html (luxury: newer estates, triple-car garages, epoxy showroom floors)
garage-organization-bearspaw.html (acreage/estate: oversized shops, vehicle lifts, RV storage)
IMPROVE garage-organization-aspen-woods.html with luxury angle (currently thin ~12KB)

indexing.method: GSC URL Inspection via Claude in Chrome

runs.notes: Target chosen over stale seo-log flag: Aspen Woods was already rewritten to 1715 words with luxury angle in an earlier commit (flag corrected). Weakest high-value page was garage-decluttering-calgary.html at 796 words on a CORE keyword. Expanded 796->1787 words: why-Calgary-garages-fill-up (4-season gear, chinook freeze-thaw slab damage, -30 parking stakes), decluttering-vs-junk-removal differentiation (SERP is dominated by junk haulers - Taskrabbit, Western Junk Removal, Junk PROS), where-stuff-goes (donation/recycling/City of Calgary hazardous waste), Calgary decluttering calendar (chinook windows / spring reset / Sept-Oct beat-the-freeze), beyond-Calgary section. New ~55-char title, ~155-char meta, OpenGraph tags added, 3 new FAQs (visible + FAQPage schema), REMOVED unverified aggregateRating (5 stars / 47 reviews) from LocalBusiness schema per no-invented-reviews rule, 14 unique internal links incl. Canmore/Aspen Woods/spring-cleanout/city pages. Sitemap lastmod 2026-07-15. Live 200 verified post-deploy. NOTE: other pages may also carry invented aggregateRating blocks - worth auditing on a future Sunday technical run.
flags_corrected: garage-organization-aspen-woods.html is NOT thin (1715 words, luxury angle already applied); remaining thin pages by word count: garage-organization-south-calgary.html (788), garage-organization-east-calgary.html (811), garage-organization-north-calgary.html (831), garage-organization-west-calgary.html (843)

runs.keyword: garage organization Springbank Hill / custom garage cabinets Springbank Hill / epoxy garage floor Springbank
runs.notes: First target from next_targets (west Calgary luxury). SERP check: no dedicated Springbank Hill page exists anywhere - only generic Calgary garage companies (The Garage Store, California Closets, Garage Living, Dream Garage Makeovers). Angle deliberately DISTINCT from adjacent Aspen Woods page (which covers RV/boat zoning, large-garage declutters, workshops): Springbank Hill = builder-basic unfinished garages in estate homes, third-bay trap in triple garages, custom cabinets/slatwall at estate finish level, epoxy showroom floors (floor-first process), mudroom-to-garage overflow systems. Local texture: Elveden/Timberline/The Slopes/Springborough/Spring Valley sub-areas, 85th St SW new builds, Westside Rec Centre, Rundle College/Webber Academy, Highway 8 mountain access, chinook freeze-thaw slab damage on the exposed west ridge. 1649 words, 1 H1, title 49 chars, meta 158 chars, canonical + OG + Twitter, LocalBusiness + FAQPage + Breadcrumb JSON-LD (all validated, NO invented reviews/ratings), 15 internal links incl. aspen-woods (x3), renovation, storage-solutions, calgary flagship, canmore. Linked FROM index.html (new Springbank Hill location card). sitemap.xml: new entry lastmod 2026-07-16, homepage lastmod bumped.
